title: Henrique & Juliano
summary:
Henrique & Juliano, sometimes written Henrique e Juliano, is a Brazilian sertanejo duo. Their single "Cuida Bem Dela" was number 1 for 8 weeks in the Brasil Hot 100 Airplay and has been accessed by over 220 million viewers on YouTube.
The brothers are from Palmeirópolis, in the Brazilian state of Tocantins. They have been compared to other male sertaneja duos, Henrique & Diego and Jorge e Mateus.
text:
Henrique & Juliano, sometimes written Henrique e Juliano, is a Brazilian sertanejo duo. Their single "Cuida Bem Dela" was number 1 for 8 weeks in the Brasil Hot 100 Airplay and has been accessed by over 220 million viewers on YouTube.
The brothers are from Palmeirópolis, in the Brazilian state of Tocantins. They have been compared to other male sertaneja duos, Henrique & Diego and Jorge e Mateus.
